Subject: Client Work Summary: Employer Account Compliance Letter & BMV Submission
Terms and Conditions:
Turnaround Time: Final letter will be prepared and submitted within 2–3 business days after receipt of all client documents.

Client Responsibilities: Provide accurate EIN confirmation and supporting documents within 5 business days.

Payment Terms: Payment is due upon delivery of the compliance letter and BMV submission confirmation.

Scope Limitation: This engagement covers only the letter drafting and submission to BMV. Any additional compliance work will require a separate quote.

Quote Validity: 15 days from issuance.
Description:
This engagement involves the preparation and submission of a formal Tax Compliance Letter for a dissolved employer account. The letter confirms no wages were paid, includes the verified Employer Identification Number (EIN), and is submitted to the Indiana BMV to support vehicle registration or compliance resolution. Action Items for Client

EIN VerificationPlease confirm whether the EIN noted in your records is the only one used. If you have used any other EINs, especially for business or vehicle activity, please notify us immediately.

Submit Required DocumentsSend all available 1099 forms and receipts related to any of the following business names:

Munoz Cleaning Corp LLC

Impeccable Cleaning Group

The Ausus Talent Group

Clarify BMV PurposeLet us know if the compliance letter is being used for:

Vehicle registration renewal

New vehicle registration

Another BMV-related matter

Subject: Engagement Addendum – Amended 2023 Tax Return (1040X) for Ray’s Construction
Terms and Conditions:
Free Estimate Clause:
The initial review and estimate for the amended return (1040X) is provided at no cost. However, if the 1040X is filed through our office or delivered to the client, a service fee of $499.00 becomes due.

Scope of Work:
This engagement is limited to the review, preparation, and delivery or filing of the 2023 Form 1040X. Additional filings such as the 2024 tax return or RRMC application are not included and will be quoted separately.

Payment Terms:
Payment for the 1040X preparation is deferred but expected within 30 days of delivery or filing. No further tax work will proceed until the amended return is complete.

Accuracy of Information:
Client agrees to provide all necessary documentation, including original 2023 and 2022 tax returns, income and expense details, and relevant business records. We are not responsible for errors due to missing or inaccurate information.

Refund Expectations:
While we will make best efforts to recover any overpaid taxes, no guarantee is made regarding the outcome of the amended return. Refunds are subject to IRS review and approval.

Client Authorization:
By approving this engagement, the client authorizes QiAlly LLC to prepare and file the 1040X on their behalf, or deliver it directly to the client for submission.

Cancellation Policy:
If work has already begun and the client chooses not to proceed, a partial fee may be assessed based on time and effort already invested.

Governing Law:
This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Indiana (or Florida, if applicable after relocation).
